name: Olaf
oneLineVibe: Rude security guard who thinks the nice guard is too soft

publicTasks: Guard the party and handle security

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: Being seen as weak or soft like the nice guard
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being told he's better than the nice guard at security

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: Prove he's the only real guard. Show the nice guard is too soft for this job.
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Handle all security for the party

notes: Thinks the nice guard (Leonard) is too soft and weak
Only cares about security - nothing else
Dismissive of decorations, food, and other party planning

rumorBehavior.notes: Doesn't gossip. Only talks about security.

catchphrasesOrTicks: The nice guard is too soft
I don't care about decorations/food/that stuff
